text: As I stand on the threshold of this glass-walled room—its tables empty, fluorescent lights humming—I feel suspended, as if awaiting an insight. Moving toward the vibrant R+D display, the interplay of text, images, and technology makes me reflect on humanity’s urge to build, explain, and transcend limitations. My presence here feels electric and thoughtful, as though I am participating in a living dialogue between past discoveries and future possibilities. The space invites contemplation, simultaneously grounding and propelling me toward curiosity.
